name: search_brain
description: Search personal knowledge base by meaning using semantic similarity

name: add_memory
description: Add new knowledge to the personal brain with embeddings for future retrieval

name: recall
description: List memories with optional filtering by source, tags, or date

name: forget
description: Delete a memory from the brain by its UUID

name: brain_stats
description: Get statistics about the knowledge base: total memories, sources breakdown

name: create_file
description: Create or overwrite a file with the specified content

name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a file at the given path

name: list_directory
description: List files and directories at a given path

name: run_shell_command
description: Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr

name: search_files
description: Search for text patterns across files in a directory

name: git_status
description: Get the git status of the current repository

name: git_diff
description: Show changes in the working tree or between commits

name: git_commit
description: Stage files and create a git commit

name: create_pull_request
description: Create a GitHub pull request from the current branch

name: list_issues
description: List GitHub issues for a repository

name: create_issue
description: Create a new GitHub issue

name: run_test_suite
description: Run the project test suite and return results

name: run_linter
description: Run ESLint on the project and return lint errors

name: type_check
description: Run TypeScript type checking with tsc --noEmit

name: search_web
description: Search the web for information about a topic

name: fetch_url
description: Fetch and parse the content of a URL

name: supabase_query
description: Execute a SQL query against the Supabase PostgreSQL database

name: supabase_insert
description: Insert rows into a Supabase table
